entries.title: Exposition on Psalm 112
entries.excerpt: I believe, brethren, that you remarked and committed to memory the title of this Psalm. The conversion, he says, of Haggai and Zechariah. These prophets were not as yet in existence, when these verses were sung.. ..But both, the one within a year after the other, began to prophesy that which seems to pertain to the restoration of the temple, as was foretold so long before.. ..For the temple of God is holy, which temple you are. 1 Corinthians 3:17 Whoever therefore converts himself to the work of this building together, and to the hope of a firm and holy edifice, like a living stone from the…
